prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约8689名、9588名、11106名、9715名、8745名。整体呈\"降-升-降\"波动走势：2021至2023年累计后移约2 417名，2024年大幅回升至9715名，2025年进一步回升至8745名，接近2021年水平。近两年回升趋势明显，2025年基准位次约8745名；该校在天津市综合类招生 计划：2021–2023年均为82人，2024年增至91人，2025年增至95人，2026年（招生计划文件）进一步增至100人。连续三年扩招，2026年较2025年扩招5人（+5.26%），扩招趋势明 确，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国地质大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第75名（2026年），近年排名稳定在70–75名区间， 属于中上水平211院校，对中等偏上分数段考生有稳定吸引力；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情事件；抖音平台热度处于一般水平，未进入总排名前100；无投档线断档或暴跌记录。整体报考心理环境稳定，无异常扰动因素；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统王牌学科（第四轮学科评估均为A+），在地球 科学领域具有显著优势。招生专业中地质学类、地质工程、地球物理学、测绘工程等与优势学科高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电 子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校开设的计算机科学与技术、软件工程、人工智能、电气工程及其自动化等专业受益于整体工科热度。天津市2026年高 考考生总数约82000人，较2025年（71938人）增加约10062人，增幅约14%，考生规模显著扩大，整体竞争加剧。；该校位于 北京市，属于在京211高校，对天津考生具有天然的地域吸引力（距离近、京津冀协同发展）。天津考生对北京高校的报考偏好历来较强，地域优势对位次有支撑作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年回升趋势、2026年招生计划继续小幅扩招（+5.26%）、天津市考生总数大幅增加（+14%）、学校声誉稳定且地域吸引力强等因素，扩招对竞争有缓解 但考生增量远超扩招幅度，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧。预测最低录取位次约9071名，位次区间8571–9571名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for this university in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 8689, 9588, 11106, 9715, and 8745 respectively. The overall trend shows a "down-up-down" fluctuation: from 2021 to 2023, it moved back by about 2,417 places, then rebounded significantly to 9715 in 2024, and further to 8745 in 2025, approaching the 2021 level. The rebound trend in the past two years is clear, with a baseline ranking of about 8745 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin's comprehensive category: 82 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 91 in 2024, 95 in 2025, and further to 100 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). Continuous expansion for three years, with an increase of 5 students (+5.26%) in 2026 compared to 2025, indicating a clear expansion trend, which somewhat alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Geosciences (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 75th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with a stable ranking in the 70-75 range in recent years. It is a mid-to-upper level 211 institution, attracting stable interest from mid-to-upper score segment candidates. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. Its popularity on Douyin platform is at an average level, not entering the top 100 overall. There are no records of admission cutoff line drops or crashes. The overall application psychological environment is stable, with no abnormal disturbance factors. The university's traditional ace disciplines are Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering (both rated A+ in the fourth round of discipline evaluation), with significant advantages in the field of Earth Sciences. Majors such as Geology, Geological Engineering, Geophysics, and Surveying Engineering are highly correlated with these advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The university offers majors like Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Electrical Engineering and Automation, benefiting from the overall engineering popularity. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao candidates in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of about 10,062 from 2025 (71,938), an increase of about 14%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Beijing, a 211 university in the capital, naturally attractive to Tianjin candidates (close distance, Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei coordinated development). Tianjin candidates have historically had a strong preference for Beijing universities, and the location advantage supports the ranking.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound trend in historical rankings over the past two years, the continued slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+5.26%), the significant increase in the total number of Tianjin candidates (+14%), the stable reputation and strong location appeal of the university, the expansion alleviates competition but the increase in candidates far exceeds the expansion, so competition in 2026 is expected to be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum admission ranking is about 9071, with a ranking range of 8571-9571.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 9071, range 8571-9571. Candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (within about 8800) are advised to focus on Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Software, Electrical Engineering, Law); candidates with rankings in the middle part (about 9000-9300) should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Geographic Information Science, Big Data, Electronic Information, Geology Base Class, etc.), while also considering borderline Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings in the lower part (outside about 9300) should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options (Geology, Geological, etc., ace disciplines), while also attempting Tier 2 majors. Although the university's geoscience disciplines (Geology A+, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering A+) are in Tier 3, they have top-tier academic strength, suitable for candidates interested in Earth Sciences.
